# data-chart

> Chart your tables. No JavaScript to write. A zero-dependency library that converts HTML `<table>` elements into SVG charts using data attributes.

## Quick Start

```html
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/data-chart@0/dist/data-chart.js"></script>

<table data-chart="bar">
  <thead><tr><th></th><th>Sales</th></tr></thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr><th>Jan</th><td>120</td></tr>
    <tr><th>Feb</th><td>200</td></tr>
    <tr><th>Mar</th><td>150</td></tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

No `init()`. No config objects. Just a `<table>` with `data-chart`.

## Core Concept

Add a `data-chart` attribute to any HTML `<table>`. The library auto-initializes on DOMContentLoaded, parses the table data, and renders an SVG chart. MutationObserver handles dynamically added tables (SPA support).

## Chart Types (5)

- **bar** — Vertical bar chart (supports `data-chart-horizontal` and `data-chart-stacked`)
- **line** — Line chart with data point dots
- **area** — Area chart with filled region
- **pie** — Pie chart
- **donut** — Donut chart with center total

## Data Attributes

| Attribute | Type | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|---------|-------------|
| `data-chart` | string | (required) | Chart type: bar, line, area, pie, donut |
| `data-chart-height` | number | 220 | Chart height in px |
| `data-chart-colors` | string | auto | Comma-separated hex colors |
| `data-chart-grid` | string | "y" | Grid lines: y, x, both, none |
| `data-chart-legend` | string | auto | Legend position: top, bottom, none (auto: top if 2+ series) |
| `data-chart-radius` | number | 3 | Bar corner radius in px |
| `data-chart-horizontal` | boolean | — | Horizontal bar chart (bar only) |
| `data-chart-stacked` | boolean | — | Stacked bar chart (bar only) |
| `data-chart-animate` | boolean | — | Enable entrance animations |
| `data-chart-animate-duration` | number | 600 | Animation duration in ms |
| `data-chart-animate-stagger` | number | 60 | Stagger delay between elements in ms |

## Table Structure

```html
<table data-chart="bar">
  <caption>Optional title</caption>
  <thead>
    <tr><th></th><th>Series A</th><th>Series B</th></tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr><th>Label 1</th><td>100</td><td>80</td></tr>
    <tr><th>Label 2</th><td>200</td><td>150</td></tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

- First `<th>` in thead is ignored (category column header)
- Remaining `<th>` cells = series names
- First cell in each tbody row = category label
- Remaining cells = numeric values
- `<caption>` = chart title (used for `aria-label`)

## Value Parsing

Automatically strips: `¥`, `$`, `€`, `£`, `₩` (leading), `%` (trailing), commas. Negative values supported.

## Dark Mode

Automatically adapts to `prefers-color-scheme: dark`. No configuration needed.

## Default Color Palette

`#2d5be3`, `#1a8c5a`, `#d94e3f`, `#c78a1e`, `#6b4ed4`, `#1a8c8c`, `#e05898`, `#4a90d9`

## JavaScript API

```js
window.dataChart.init()          // Initialize (auto-called)
window.dataChart.render(table)   // Render a single table
window.dataChart.refresh(table)  // Re-render (destroy & recreate)
window.dataChart.destroy(table?) // Remove chart(s)
window.dataChart.version         // Library version
```

## Events

- `datachart:rendered` — Fired after SVG rendered (`detail: { svg, data }`)
- `datachart:error` — Fired on error (`detail: { message }`)
- `datachart:destroyed` — Fired when chart removed

## Installation

**CDN:**
```html
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/data-chart@0/dist/data-chart.js"></script>
```

**npm:**
```bash
npm install data-chart
```

```js
import 'data-chart'; // auto-initializes
```

## Common Patterns

**Multi-series bar chart:**
```html
<table data-chart="bar" data-chart-animate>
  <thead><tr><th></th><th>2024</th><th>2025</th></tr></thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr><th>Q1</th><td>300</td><td>450</td></tr>
    <tr><th>Q2</th><td>400</td><td>500</td></tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

**Horizontal stacked bar:**
```html
<table data-chart="bar" data-chart-horizontal data-chart-stacked>...</table>
```

**Pie chart with custom colors:**
```html
<table data-chart="pie" data-chart-colors="#ff6384,#36a2eb,#ffce56">...</table>
```

**Line chart without grid:**
```html
<table data-chart="line" data-chart-grid="none" data-chart-height="300">...</table>
```
